title: Inventory, oracle, and parity matrix
description: Establish the source inventory, Cafex delta classification, fixture oracle, and go/no-go boundaries before implementation starts.

title: haxe.rust scaffold and compiler gates
description: Create the minimal Haxe-to-Rust scaffold, locked builds, CI checks, and interop policy.
acceptance_criteria: Portable and metal builds are configured
Generated Cargo crate passes locked check

title: Protocol, DTO, schema, and fixture parity
description: Implement selected Codex/Cafex protocol DTOs and fixture round-trip tests.

title: Headless one-turn Codex runtime
description: Build a credential-free, mutation-free one-turn runtime using a mock model stream.

title: Native tool and state capability slices
description: Add controlled native wrappers for dry-run tools, process execution, sandbox policy, and state storage.

title: Cafex seam compatibility
description: Implement and test the Cafex seams needed for Cafetera compatibility.
acceptance_criteria: Cafetera contract subset can target hxrust binary

title: Replacement gate and migration plan
description: Decide whether the experiment remains helper-only, sidecar/headless, slice replacement, or broader replacement candidate.

title: haxe.rust production capability report
description: Convert the Codex pressure test into actionable haxe.rust production-readiness findings.

title: Baseline upstream, Cafex, and haxe.rust topology
description: Document crate/module topology and version/license/toolchain facts from the attached snapshots.
acceptance_criteria: Codex workspace member count and key crates recorded
Cafex fork location and version recorded

title: Classify Cafex runtime deltas into replacement slices
description: Classify Cafex-only or Cafex-modified behavior into receipts, goals, effort, wake/restart, state, app-server, TUI, and unsupported surfaces.
acceptance_criteria: Each delta is marked helper-only, headless candidate, native-wrapper candidate, or out-of-scope
Existing Cafetera issue f12e-class32f27 is linked or superseded

title: Build fixture inventory for upstream and Cafex parity
description: Inventory protocol schemas, app-server fixtures, Cafetera contract fixtures, and any runtime snapshots used as comparison oracles.
acceptance_criteria: Unsupported or missing fixtures are tracked

title: Define parity scorecard and hard kill criteria
description: Create the gate checklist that determines whether the experiment stays helper-only, becomes a sidecar, or can target replacement slices.
acceptance_criteria: Each milestone maps to a gate

title: Decide experiment repository/module ownership
description: Choose where codex-hxrust lives and how it references Cafetera/Codex/haxe.rust snapshots.
acceptance_criteria: Brew conversion metadata needs are noted

title: Create codex-hxrust scaffold
description: Create initial src/native/fixtures/harness layout for the experiment.

title: Configure portable and metal build profiles
description: Add HXML/Cargo configuration for portable DTO builds and metal runtime builds.

title: Add generated Cargo CI gates
description: Run generated Rust through locked Cargo checks and tests.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --locked runs for generated crate

title: Document typed extern and raw Rust allowlist policy
description: Define exactly where native Rust wrappers are allowed and how Haxe externs bind to them.
acceptance_criteria: Raw Rust app-code ban is stated

title: Implement minimal generated binary with doctor JSON
description: Build the smallest generated binary that prints version/toolchain/profile information as machine-readable JSON.
acceptance_criteria: Fixture test asserts the JSON shape
No credentials or real Codex runtime needed

title: Implement core protocol IDs and newtypes
description: Implement strongly typed wrappers for session, turn, thread, tool call, model, and path-like IDs.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid values are rejected or documented

title: Implement JSON boundary and serde bridge policy
description: Define typed JSON encode/decode utilities and native serde boundary where needed.

title: Implement config/profile DTO subset
description: Implement selected Codex/Caf profile/config DTOs needed for headless mock runtime.
acceptance_criteria: Secrets are redacted from diagnostic output

title: Implement protocol event/request/response subset
description: Implement the selected headless protocol subset for session start, submit input, interrupt, status, transcript, events, and errors.

title: Add schema fingerprint and golden fixture diff
description: Add a harness that compares generated DTO fixture output against upstream/Cafex fixtures and emits schema fingerprints.
acceptance_criteria: Schema fingerprint changes fail CI unless accepted

title: Implement mock model stream parser
description: Parse deterministic mock model stream fixtures into internal runtime events.
acceptance_criteria: Parsed events compare to golden output

title: Define model client interface and mock provider
description: Define the provider boundary without binding to real auth/network yet.

title: Implement one-turn session state machine
description: Implement the minimal session/turn flow from prompt to assistant final event.

title: Expose headless JSONL/app-server adapter harness
description: Expose a simple command/protocol adapter that can be compared with upstream app-server/debug-client behavior for selected requests.

title: Implement minimal transcript and state store
description: Write deterministic transcript/state artifacts for the mock run.
acceptance_criteria: Transcript JSONL writes atomically where possible

title: Implement cancellation and interrupt handling
description: Support interrupt/cancel at safe checkpoints in the mock runtime.
acceptance_criteria: No orphaned native process path exists in mock mode

title: Implement apply-patch dry-run compatibility slice
description: Implement or wrap a dry-run apply-patch capability with fixture parity before allowing mutation.

title: Implement process exec wrapper and approval model
description: Add process execution behind an explicit approval and policy interface.
acceptance_criteria: Approved fixture command executes in test sandbox

title: Implement sandbox permission gate wrapper
description: Represent sandbox policy as a fail-closed native wrapper instead of rewriting platform sandbox internals first.

title: Spike JSONL versus SQLite state backend
description: Evaluate whether JSONL state is enough for the experiment or whether SQLite/sqlx parity is needed.
acceptance_criteria: No production state migration is implied

title: Implement MCP/tool registry compatibility skeleton
description: Add a minimal tool registry shape compatible enough for selected Codex/Cafex fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: Unsupported MCP features return explicit errors
Future real MCP work is scoped

title: Add telemetry/logging/doctor output
description: Make runtime diagnostics useful without leaking secrets.
acceptance_criteria: Doctor output includes build/profile/runtime feature flags

title: Implement Caf session and turn receipt writers
description: Implement env-driven Caf-compatible session and turn receipt behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Absent env vars produce no receipt
Present env vars write expected receipt JSON
Receipt fixtures match Cafex schema expectations

title: Implement Caf effort and wake bridge subset
description: Implement directory/request/receipt bridge behavior for effort and wake controls.

title: Implement minimal Caf goals DTO/state/tooling flow
description: Implement a minimal goal lifecycle compatible with Cafetera contract fixtures.
acceptance_criteria: Minimal goal tool handler fixture passes

title: Implement wake/restart/session-continuity receipt harness
description: Represent successor/predecessor session continuity as explicit fixture-tested metadata.
acceptance_criteria: No hidden inference from side effects

title: Run Cafetera Codex module contract subset against hxrust
description: Configure selected Cafetera Codex module contract tests to target the hxrust binary/adapter.
acceptance_criteria: No production replacement claim is made from partial pass

title: Create seam ledger mapping for supported Cafex deltas
description: Map each supported Cafex delta to its hxrust implementation, fixture, owner, and replacement status.
acceptance_criteria: Every supported delta has a ledger row
Every unsupported delta has a reason
Ledger is usable in replacement review

title: Compare Cafex patch-stack/rebase friction against hxrust path
description: Estimate whether the hxrust path actually reduces maintenance compared with the fork for supported slices.

title: Define migration modes and adapter rollout
description: Document helper-only, sidecar/headless, slice replacement, and broader replacement rollout modes.

title: Run replacement go/no-go review
description: Make the formal decision on helper-only, sidecar, slice replacement, broader candidate, or stop.

title: Write rollback, distribution, and operator notes
description: Document how to run, disable, or roll back the experiment in Cafetera workflows.
acceptance_criteria: No production default is changed without decision record

title: Collect haxe.rust gaps from Codex pressure test
description: Capture compiler/runtime/interop gaps found while implementing the Codex-shaped workload.
acceptance_criteria: Raw Rust escape pressure is quantified
Gaps are mapped to source areas

title: Create upstreamable haxe.rust fixtures/issues
description: Turn stable gaps into minimal fixtures or issues suitable for haxe.rust upstream work.
acceptance_criteria: Minimal repros exist for high-value gaps

title: Write production-readiness report
description: Score haxe.rust against language/runtime/interop/security/performance/maintenance dimensions from the experiment.

title: Write post-experiment decision record
description: Archive the experiment outcome and preserve useful outputs even if replacement does not proceed.
